verified.title: Factory OEM Non Toxic Gel Nail Polish Strips Press on Nails
verified.description: Real gel nail polish product concept shot -- colored gel droplets poured over french-tip nail forms, showing the polish application directly. Non-toxic formulation per listing.
verified.supplier_url: https://www.alibaba.com (search listing; individual product page blocked by Alibaba's own bot-detection CAPTCHA, not attempted -- pricing/image sourced from the live search-results page and page DOM directly instead)
verified.cost_source_moq: EGP 135.17-146.43 shown on Alibaba search listing (~$2.75-2.98 USD at time of check); exact USD tier not confirmed since the product detail page was not accessible
verified.quality_differentiator: Shanghai Huizi is an established, 13-year, 4.9/5.0-rated (159 reviews) 'Power Brand' verified supplier per Alibaba's own listing -- real reputation signal, not a brand-new/unrated storefront.
verified.verification_method: webfetch_direct (Alibaba search page, not product detail page) + browser-rendered image extraction
verified.verification_evidence: Alibaba search results page for the province-targeted query loaded via Chrome browser automation; supplier name, rating, and price pulled directly from the live DOM (not fabricated); image URL extracted from the page's own element, curl-verified HTTP 200, downloaded and visually confirmed as a clean, text-free product concept photo (colored gel on nail tips, no watermark/logo/style-code).

verified.title: 3D Press-On Nails Embossed with Sculpted Details
verified.description: Press-on nails with sculpted, raised 3D surfaces for salon-style nail artistry. Thick, strong tips engineered to support 3D structures and resist damage. OEM/ODM production line.
verified.cost_source_moq: Listed unit price on product page; MOQ 3,000 units for customized designs (packaging box MOQ 5,000 sets) — bulk per-unit price at full MOQ requires separate quote
verified.quality_differentiator: Eco-friendly ABS/acrylic (RCS material option), FDA and MSDS certified, engineered thick tips for embossed 3D structures. Foshan, Guangdong factory, up to 1,000,000 sets/month capacity.
verified.verification_evidence: ennionails.com/products/3d-nails confirmed title, $30.00 listed price, MOQ 3,000/5,000, materials and FDA/MSDS claims. Image downloaded and visually inspected: clean hand/product photo, no text overlay, HTTP 200.
